articles.title: US Judge denies requests to block Elon Musk’s D.O.G.E from the labor department
articles.description: A federal judge in Washington, D.C., has refused to block Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (D.O.G.E) from accessing US Department of Labor data. The ruling came on Saturday after the labor union American Federation of Labor and Congress of Industrial Organizations (AFL-CIO) filed a lawsuit against Elon. In its court filing, the AFL-CIO said […]

articles.title: Solana ETF Increasingly Likely After the SEC’s Unprecedented Step
articles.description: The Securities and Exchange Commission started the clock on a Solana ETF approval period this week.

articles.title: Ripple’s XRP Prepping For Ultra Bullish 1,500% Breakout As Spot XRP ETFs Gain Major Traction
articles.description: Major asset managers are now vying to introduce the first spot XRP ETFs in the U.S. in the wake of Bitcoin and Ether's approvals in 2024.
